_comment: exp_026 — GRPO pass 5 from the pass-4 merged model. SINGLE intentional change from exp_022 (the pass-4 recipe): the base model and curriculum advance one pass. Same G=4, T=1.0, max_completion=5120, lr=2e-5, beta=0.01, length_bonus, matched-sampler curriculum recipe. pass-4 was the FIRST pass to move the board (0.586 -> 0.600 stage-1-only, ~+1.4pp / ~0.6sigma); the matched-sampler curriculum (top_k disabled, N=8, 5120 budget, allow-clipped) is the recipe that produced that board-transferable gain where the old top_k=20 curriculum did not. pass-5 tests whether that recipe keeps paying or whether 0.600 was a one-time step off the converged plateau. STOPPING RULE (pre-committed): pass-5 stage-1-only board must beat pass-4's 0.600 by >= +1pp (>= 0.610) to justify pass-6; a tie at ~0.600 means GRPO has converged on the board -> STOP, gains stand, pivot. See experiments/exp_022_grpo_pass4/notes.md and memory grpo-local-no-transfer.
_curriculum_note: Build with: python scripts/filter_curriculum_v2.py --in data/difficulty_samples_pass4.jsonl --out experiments/exp_026_grpo_pass5/curriculum_pass5.json --min-correct 2 --max-correct 6 --allow-clipped --ff-mcq-ratio 2.0. IDENTICAL filter recipe to pass-4. Difficulty is sampled from the PASS-4 policy (not pass-3) at the training-matched per-token distribution (top_k=-1, top_p=1.0, T=1.0, N=8) at MAX_NEW_TOKENS=5120 == training max_completion_length, --allow-clipped (a clip is a real training-time truncation, a live-gradient target). Sampler script: scripts/launch_difficulty_pass4.sh (MODEL_ID=pass-4, OUT_SUFFIX=pass4 -> data/difficulty_samples_pass4.jsonl). If the post-filter curriculum is <40 prompts, that itself signals pass-4 has saturated this prompt set at 5120 — weak prior for a pass-5 gain.

length_bonus.note: Same as exp_015/exp_019/exp_022. Continuous descent from 0.05 at len=0 to 0.0 at cap; guarantees nonzero reward_std even when discrete reward terms collapse across the 4 generations in a group.

_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=pass-4 GRPO. Do NOT override to an earlier pass (would pull policy backward).

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id=output_repo (after running merge_and_push.ipynb to merge the adapter).
